title: RunPod remote engine — Phase 5 hardening (tests + secret audit + cost docs)
description: Promoted from MPI-64 Phase 5 (plan lines 149-151) / OPEN-ITEMS F7. Pre-release hardening for the remote engine, three parts: (a) integration/mocked tests for RunPod lifecycle + wrapper error states (bad API key, unavailable GPU, stale manifest, stopped Pod, wrapper-not-ready, mid-gen network loss, interrupt, app-quit cleanup); (b) secret-hygiene end-to-end audit — logger output, logs/app.log, bug-reporter payloads, persisted state must NEVER contain the RunPod API key or wrapper token; add redaction where a code path could carry them; (c) user-facing cost/responsibility docs + settings copy (RunPod billing/key/storage are the user's; stopped Pods still bill storage; Community Cloud unsupported). App + docs + tests. See brief.md.
